svg.text: Scientific Hypothesis Agent for Novel Discovery — System Architecture

foreignObject.xhtml:div: SHANDY is an autonomous scientific discovery platform that runs Claude Code CLI as a headless AI agent. It iteratively explores datasets, formulates hypotheses, tests them through statistical analysis and literature review, and produces research reports with full provenance. Two modes: fully autonomous discovery loops or collaborative coinvestigation with scientist feedback. Multi-tenant via PostgreSQL RLS.

g.text: API key auth · Bearer token · tested
✓ OAuth tokens encrypted at rest — Fernet symmetric encryption via TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY
Discovery loop · CLI subprocess · session mgmt
LLM Q&A about job results and findings
ZIP export of reports · plots · provenance
GIN full-text pre-filter · Anthropic semantic scoring
Each job runs in isolated shandy-executor container · Docker SDK spawns siblings via /var/run/docker.sock
mem_limit=2g · cpu_limit=50% · network_disabled · read_only=false (plots) · auto-cleanup on completion
FastMCP · provenance/artifact storage · plot auto-save · lazy data loading
SQLAlchemy ORM · asyncpg · Alembic migrations · UUID v7 PKs · CASCADE deletes

xhtml:div.style: font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 9.5px; color: #475569; line-height: 1.45; text-align: justify;
xhtml:div.xhtml:p: set_current_user(session, user_id) sets app.current_user_id session variable. PostgreSQL evaluates RLS policies per-row using this variable. The bypass_rls() context manager allows admin and migration operations to skip policy checks.

xhtml:div.style: font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 9.5px; color: #475569; line-height: 1.5;

xhtml:tr.xhtml:td: Uploaded data files (CSV, Excel, HDF5, AnnData)

g.text: DB ⇄ Filesystem dual sync via KnowledgeState
Provider selection: CLAUDE_PROVIDER env var (cborg | anthropic | vertex | bedrock)
✓ Bot/API Client — Full REST API with /jobs, /keys, /shares, /skills endpoints
✓ Skills Database System — GIN-indexed full-text search + Anthropic semantic scoring
✓ Skill Auto-Matching — Auto-match skills to jobs based on research questions
✓ Periodic Skill Sync — Background scheduler syncs GitHub/local sources hourly
✓ Extensible Ingesters — Registry pattern for adding new skill sources (S3, GitLab, etc.)
Python 3.10+ · NiceGUI · FastAPI · SQLAlchemy · asyncpg · PostgreSQL 18 · Claude Code CLI · FastMCP · Docker
Terms and technologies used in this architecture, explained for non-technical stakeholders

xhtml:td.style: width: 130px; font-weight: 600; color: #1E293B; vertical-align: top; padding: 2px 8px 2px 0;
width: 370px; text-align: justify; vertical-align: top; padding: 2px 20px 2px 0;

xhtml:tr.xhtml:td: Docker containers spawned by the main container to run code in isolation — like separate secure rooms.

xhtml:td.style: width: 130px; font-weight: 600; color: #1E293B; vertical-align: top; padding: 2px 8px 2px 0;

xhtml:tr.xhtml:td: Software that packages applications into isolated, portable containers that run anywhere.
Industry-standard login protocol — "Sign in with GitHub" uses this. You don't share passwords.
Database feature ensuring users can only see their own data — built into PostgreSQL.
Model Context Protocol — standard interface for AI assistants to use tools (execute code, search, etc.).
Python framework for building web interfaces with real-time updates (no JavaScript needed).
Modern Python framework for building REST APIs with automatic documentation and validation.
Python library for database access — translates Python code to SQL database queries.
Symmetric encryption standard — same key encrypts and decrypts. Used for OAuth token storage.
Anthropic's command-line AI assistant that SHANDY runs as an autonomous agent.
Open-source relational database with advanced features like RLS. Version 18 used here.
Standard way for programs to communicate over HTTP — enables bot/automation access.
